name: NTAO Vehicle Decommission Process
description: NTAO operational process for vehicle decommissioning

steps.title: Operational Impact Assessment
steps.description: Assess operational impact of vehicle decommission

substeps.title: Review service territory impact
substeps.description: Analyze impact on service territory coverage and capacity

substeps.title: Identify replacement coverage options
substeps.description: Determine alternative coverage solutions for affected territory

substeps.title: Assess technician reassignment needs
substeps.description: Evaluate need for technician reassignment to maintain coverage

steps.title: Service Transition Coordination
steps.description: Coordinate service transition and coverage adjustments

substeps.title: Update dispatch routing systems
substeps.description: Adjust routing and dispatch systems for decommissioned vehicle

substeps.title: Communicate service changes to stakeholders
substeps.description: Notify relevant stakeholders of service coverage changes

substeps.title: Update operational records
substeps.description: Update all operational records to reflect vehicle decommission
